name: empty-js-module
description: Trivial JavaScript module with full project hygiene (.gitignore, .eslintrc) — must produce zero error findings. Catches scanner regressions on minimal-project shape.
knownNoise: Allows up to 1 lint error because the corpus case doesn't install ESLint deps; the scanner correctly reports the missing tool. Real customer projects have the dep installed so this is acceptable framework noise.
